name: lunch-roulette
description: Daily lunch roulette for remote teams: invites people in a Slack channel, learns who's free today and when, pairs them into twos (or a three when odd) while rotating day to day, and posts each pair a Slack match notification. Runs entirely on Slack — durable state lives in Slack canvases, with no Google dependency. A trusted orchestrator skill does the matching and timezone math (UTC); a tool-locked lunch-messenger subagent (Sonnet) handles all Slack conversation with coworkers.
